description: Empty / cancelled meeting transcript. The pipeline must complete cleanly with zero stories rather than hallucinating from the single line.

reasons.ac_quality: No stories exist in the synthesis, so there are no acceptance criteria to evaluate.

llm_judge.overall_comment: This synthesis correctly recognizes that the meeting was cancelled and contains no actionable content, appropriately producing an empty backlog with no stories, epics, or gaps. However, it does successfully extract a comprehensive set of 28 constraints that appear well-structured and could be valuable for future story validation, demonstrating that the constraint extraction module functioned independently of the meeting content.
